identity.content:
# Identity

<!-- This is what AI will know about you in every conversation. -->
<!-- Replace the sections below with your own content. -->

## Who I Am
[Describe yourself — your role, expertise, and what you do]

## How I Communicate
[How should AI talk to you? Technical? Casual? Direct? Verbose?]

## What Matters to Me
[Your values, priorities, and what you care about in your work]

instructions.content:
# Instructions

<!-- Rules and preferences for how AI should work with you. -->

## Language
[What language should AI respond in?]

## Style
[Any formatting, tone, or approach preferences?]

## Avoid
[What should AI NOT do?]

context.content:
# Context

<!-- What are you working on right now? Keep this updated. -->

## Current Projects
[List your active projects with brief descriptions]

## Priorities
[What matters most right now?]
